arts.ttl: Amorim insists Rashford must change to play again for Manchester United
arts.sum: Amorim: ‘We have to set some standards, that’s all’ Manager and player are not on speaking terms Ruben Amorim has said that if Marcus Rashford wants to play for Manchester United again he has to show he “wants it really bad” and change his standards. Amorim last selected the forward for United’s 2-1 win at Viktoria Plzen on 12 December, citing “training reasons”. Two days later Rashford said he wanted a “new challenge” and since then he has been in only one match-day squad, for the 2-0 defeat against Newcastle at Old Trafford on 30 December. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chido Obi-Martin scores again as Manchester United U21s hit five in 27 minutes
arts.sum: Manchester United Under-21s ran out comfortable winners over Oldham Athletic in the National League Cup

arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia on Celtic transfer 'watchlist' as Man Utd man lined up for Kieran Tierney January alternative
arts.sum: The Dutchman is said to be on a list of targets if the Scottish champions fail to land Tierney from Arsenal this month

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: New Rashford replacement eyed as swap offered
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: New Rashford replacement eyed as swap offered Man Utd could look to offer Alejandro Garnacho to Chelsea in a spectacular swap deal for either Christopher Nkunku or a rather surprising name.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford urged to apologise to Ruben Amorim as Man Utd feud rumbles on
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Louis Saha has told Marcus Rashford he only has himself to blame for his ongoing exile and must sort himself out before it is too late to salvage his career

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Man Utd a better team with Marcus Rashford – but he has to change
arts.sum: The 27-year-old trained with his team-mates on Wednesday but was omitted from the 21-man squad travelling to Romania.

arts.ttl: Rashford 'must change' before Man Utd return - Amorim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford "has to change" before he will be allowed to return to action for Manchester United, says head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford offered olive branch by Ruben Amorim with late Man United exit complicated
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Marcus Rashford "has to change" if he is to represent the club again.

arts.ttl: Team News: FCSB vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between FCSB and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers Marcus Rashford route back to Manchester United first team - but there's a catch
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is absent from the Man Utd squad that travelled to Romania to face FCSB in the Europa League, but he has been offered the hint of an olive branch by Ruben Amorim.
